{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;"
|+ Chassis overview
|-
!Image !! Name !! Chassis Type !! Chassis Cost !! Technology Required !! Other Requirements !! Weapon Slots !! Module Slots !! Shield Slots !! Reactor Slots !! Weapon Tech !! Shield Tech !! Module Tech !! Reactor Tech !! Payload !! Armor !! Speed !! Critical Hit Chance !! Accuracy Adjusted !! Damage Adjusted !! Defensive Merit !! Shield Projection !! Module Uplink !! Energy Distribution / Energy Share !! Energy Induction !! Damage Boost !! Drain Boost
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Bulwark|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Cargo Transport|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Crusader|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyBulwark|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCorps Overseer|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyCrusader|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyMarauder|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyOrbiter|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyRanger|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|CyValadin|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Enhanced Reaper|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Hornet|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Flaming Orbiter|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Hornet|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Leviathan|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Marauder|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Orbiter|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Overseer|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Ranger|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Reaper|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Hornet|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Recon Warthog|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Sentinel|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Terminus Prototype|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Valadin|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Viper|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|-
| {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|prop=image|size=60px}} || [[{{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog}}]] || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Type}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Unit Information|key=Chassis Cost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Unit Information|key=Technology Required}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Unit Information|key=Other Requirements}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Slots|key=Weapon Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Slots|key=Module Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Slots|key=Shield Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Slots|key=Reactor Slots}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Weapon Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Shield Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Module Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Starting Tech Levels|key=Reactor Tech}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Payload}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Armor}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Speed}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Critical Hit Chance}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Accuracy Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Damage Adjusted}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Base Stats|key=Defensive Merit}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Unique Stats|key=Shield Projection}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Unique Stats|key=Module Uplink}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Distribution / Energy Share}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Unique Stats|key=Energy Induction}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Hidden Stats|key=Damage Boost}} || {{#invoke:Chassis|get|Warthog|section=Hidden Stats|key=Drain Boost}}
|}
